<Minimap:person0>
"The history of this town itself is quite interesting... It's funny
how I'm living in a place like this so casually... Hehe."
"The old school building. It's perfect for things like courage
tests... or is it? Anyway, that place has quite a history."
"It's really entertaining just to watch."
"Ah, a Western-style mansion... Huh, has it been here since ancient
times? Despite that, it's quite beautiful, isn't it?"
"Is someone doing the cleaning or is there some kind of mysterious
force at work... but that's probably not possible."
"An abandoned building... I may already know about it, but
it might be good to study it again."
"I may know it only on a shallow level. Hmm, hmm..."
"There must be history in this abandoned factory site as well,
naturally."
"I can't help but find it truly irresistible to understand the
historical context of that time."
"...Hmm. So even abandoned warehouses...or rather, warehouses have
this kind of history."
"It's not that there's anything strange about it, but it seems that
the construction of that place involved various elements rather than
being just haphazardly built..."
"I'm reading a little history book, but that hospital that
became abandoned... it had more history than I thought."
"Books like this are interesting because you can discover unexpected
things."
